name: Haircuts & Styling
description: Transform your hair with custom cuts tailored to your face structure and lifestyle. Includes a luxury wash, signature blowout, and personalized styling.

name: Hair Coloring
description: Express your individuality with multi-dimensional coloring. From subtle balayage to bold transformations, using ammonia-free luxury colors.

name: Hair Botox
description: Rejuvenate damaged and frizzy hair with our ultra-restorative Botox treatment. Restores shine, elasticity, and softness using organic nutrients.

name: Keratin Treatment
description: Eliminate frizz and reduce styling time by up to 90%. Get silky, smooth, and manageable hair that lasts for months.

name: Beard Grooming
description: Precision beard shaping, trimming, and hot towel treatment. Includes premium beard oil application and scalp-soothing massage.

name: Facials
description: Advanced skin-specific treatments designed to cleanse, exfoliate, and hydrate. Restores natural radiance and fights signs of aging.

name: Skin Care
description: Tailored treatments using premium dermatological formulas. Solves congestion, pigmentation, and dryness for a flawless complexion.

name: Bridal Makeup
description: Look breathtaking on your special day. Custom bridal packages including trial, HD makeup, hairstyling, and draping.

name: Massage Therapy
description: Relax and unwind with aromatherapy and deep tissue massage. Relieves tension, improves circulation, and restores peace of mind.

name: Pedicure & Manicure
description: Nail detailing, skin exfoliation, and relaxing massage. Complete with premium long-lasting organic polishes.
